data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for staff to edit or override agent memory.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability for staff to edit or override agent memory, as stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not demonstrate that this functionality is implemented or available in the current system. While the linked use case mentions the need for such memory management, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this capability, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: Lack of evidence for the ability for staff to edit or override agent memory.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability for staff to edit or override agent memory.
